parameters.name: maxmemory
parameters.description: Maximum memory Redis can use. Setting appropriate value prevents OOM kills.
parameters.notes: 0 means unlimited. Set to ~70% of available RAM for production.

parameters.name: maxmemory-policy
parameters.description: Eviction policy when maxmemory is reached.
parameters.notes: allkeys-lru or allkeys-lfu recommended for cache workloads.

parameters.name: io-threads
parameters.description: Number of I/O threads for multi-threaded I/O processing.
parameters.notes: Set to 2-4 on multi-core machines. More than 4 rarely helps.

parameters.name: io-threads-do-reads
parameters.description: Enable multi-threading for read queries as well.

parameters.name: appendonly
parameters.description: Enable Append-Only File persistence.
parameters.notes: Disable for pure in-memory performance. Enable for durability.

parameters.name: appendfsync
parameters.description: AOF fsync policy. always=every write, everysec=once per second, no=OS decides.
parameters.notes: always is safest but slowest. no is fastest but risks data loss.

parameters.name: aof-use-rdb-preamble
parameters.description: Use RDB preamble for AOF rewrite (hybrid persistence).

parameters.name: save
parameters.description: RDB snapshot save rules. Format: 'seconds changes'. Set '' to disable.
parameters.notes: Disable (save '') to eliminate fork overhead for pure caching use cases.

parameters.name: activerehashing
parameters.description: Active rehashing of main hash tables. Uses CPU time but prevents latency spikes.

parameters.name: lazyfree-lazy-eviction
parameters.description: Perform eviction deletes asynchronously.

parameters.name: lazyfree-lazy-expire
parameters.description: Perform expired key deletes asynchronously.

parameters.name: lazyfree-lazy-server-del
parameters.description: Perform side-effect deletes (e.g. RENAME) asynchronously.

parameters.name: hz
parameters.description: Frequency of internal background tasks (cron) in Hz.
parameters.notes: Higher values trade CPU for lower latency on expiry/eviction.

parameters.name: databases
parameters.description: Number of logical databases. Fewer databases reduce memory overhead.

parameters.name: tcp-backlog
parameters.description: TCP listen backlog for incoming connections.

parameters.name: tcp-keepalive
parameters.description: TCP keep-alive interval in seconds.

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Close connection after N seconds of idle. 0 = no timeout.

parameters.name: repl-disable-tcp-nodelay
parameters.description: Disable TCP_NODELAY on replication connections. 'no' = less latency.

parameters.name: maxclients
parameters.description: Maximum number of simultaneous client connections.

parameters.name: slowlog-log-slower-than
parameters.description: Log queries slower than N microseconds. -1 disables slowlog.
parameters.notes: Set -1 for maximum performance (disables slowlog overhead).

parameters.name: latency-monitor-threshold
parameters.description: Latency monitor threshold in milliseconds. 0 disables it.

parameters.name: repl-backlog-size
parameters.description: Replication backlog buffer size in bytes.
parameters.notes: Larger backlog helps partial resyncs. Default 1MB. Set to 64MB+ for heavy write loads.

parameters.name: client-output-buffer-limit
parameters.description: Output buffer limits for different client classes.

parameters.name: rename-command
parameters.description: Rename or disable commands. Set to '' to disable.
parameters.notes: Security-critical: disabling FLUSHDB/FLUSHALL/CONFIG is recommended for production.

parameters.name: requirepass
parameters.description: Require password authentication.
